name: Ajwain Mellow - Millet Cookies
desc1: Crunch into wholesome goodness with our Ajwain Mellow - Millet Cookies, a perfect fusion of tradition and taste. Made with nutritious little millet and wheat, and infused with the aromatic warmth of ajwain, jeera, and pepper, these cookies deliver a savoury crunch that's both delicious and nourishing.
desc2: Packed with fiber for better digestion, heart-friendly nutrients, and niacin that helps manage cholesterol, every bite supports your wellness journey. The natural spices also help detoxify the body, making these cookies a smart snack you can enjoy guilt-free.

name: Millet Fusilli Pasta
desc1: Savour a distinctive expression of Millet Fusilli Pasta, where heritage grains are transformed into graceful spirals of indulgence. An artful blend of foxtail, kodo, little and barnyard millets, sorghum, and whole wheat creates a textured, earthy base—each twist of fusilli designed to cling effortlessly to layers of flavour.
desc2: Gently infused with coriander, cumin, and fennel, enriched by the golden warmth of turmeric and fragrant curry leaves, and elevated with delicate hints of cinnamon, clove, and nutmeg, the profile is both deep and refined.
desc3: An elegant interplay of form and flavour—crafted for those who appreciate subtle luxury in every bite.
content: Rich Source of Calcium – Supports strong bones and teeth.
Aids in Weight Loss – Keeps you fuller for longer.
Helps Reduce Blood Glucose Levels – Supports healthy sugar control.
Rich in Dietary Fiber – Promotes better digestion and gut health.
Boil noodles in 800 ml water for 5 minutes.
Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix with 1 spoon oil.
Stir-fry onion & vegetables in 2 tbsp oil for 2–3 minutes.
Add spice mix, Sauces & Pasta, toss well and serve hot.

name: Sprouted Health Mix
desc1: Our Premium Sprouted Health Mix is a nutrient-dense blend of ancient millets (foxtail, kodo, finger millet) and wholesome grains like sorghum and emmer wheat. Enriched with a protein-rich mix of legumes, urad dal, and black sesame, it features a luxury touch of almonds, cashews, and pistachios.
desc2: Finished with warming cardamom and dry ginger, this mix offers an authentic, flavorful path to everyday wellness.
content: Sprouted for Nutrition: Unlocks hidden vitamins and makes digestion effortless.
Lasting Energy: Slow-release carbs keep you fueled without the sugar crash.
Heart & Brain Health: Packed with healthy fats and antioxidants from premium nuts.
Digestive Aid: High fiber content paired with ginger and cardamom for gut comfort.
Metabolic Balance: Helps maintain stable blood sugar and a healthy metabolism.
Immune Support: A natural, traditional blend that strengthens overall body defenses.
Mix 2 tsp of our NATFOO Sprouted health mix in 300ml of milk or water, stir well to avoid lumps. Cook on low flame for 3–5 minutes until it becomes a creamy porridge.
Sweeten naturally with Jaggery Powder / Palm sugar / Honey (or) add a pinch of salt and pepper for a savoury twist.
A quick, wholesome, and indulgent treat for your body and senses.

name: Barnyard Millet Noodles
desc1: Made with nutritious Barnyard Millet, blended with wholesome wheat flour and natural cluster bean powder, this delicious Millet Noodles brings together traditional grains and a rich aromatic spice mix for a flavourful and healthy experience. Our special spice mix combines traditional ingredients like coriander, cumin, fennel, turmeric, curry leaves, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, and more to create a perfectly balanced taste.
content: Low in Calories – Ideal for a healthy and balanced diet.
Rich in Dietary Fiber – Helps support good digestion.
Low Glycemic Index – Helps manage blood sugar levels.
Good Source of Iron – Supports energy levels and overall health.
Boil noodles in 600 ml water for 5 minutes.
Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix with 1 spoon oil.
Stir-fry onion & vegetables in 2 tbsp oil for 2–3 minutes.
Add spice mix & noodles, toss well and serve hot.

name: Little Millet Vermicelli
desc1: Little millet vermicelli is a refined celebration of wholesome grains, crafted from premium little millet flour and whole wheat.
desc2: Light, delicate, and subtly nutty, it brings an air of quiet elegance to every dish.
content: Heart Health Support: Naturally rich in magnesium to promote a healthy heart
Cholesterol Balance: Helps maintain healthy cholesterol levels with niacin content
Nutrient-Rich Nourishment: Provides essential vitamins and minerals for overall wellness
Light & Wholesome: Easy to digest while being gently nourishing
Elevated Everyday Nutrition: Combines health benefits with a refined, satisfying dining experience
Rinse vermicelli in water, drain, and steam for 10 minutes (idly pan or rice cooker).
Add a spoon of oil and mix gently.
Heat 2 tbsp oil, add mustard seeds and urad dal.
Add onion, curry leaves, green chilies, vegetables, and salt; sauté for 2 minutes.
Add cooked vermicelli, cover for a minute, toss well.
Serve hot with chutney.

name: Foxtail Millet Laddu
desc1: Made with a mix of nutritious Multi Millets, blended with wholesome wheat flour and natural cluster bean powder, this delicious Millet Noodles brings together traditional grains and a rich aromatic spice mix for a flavourful and healthy experience. Our special spice mix combines traditional ingredients like coriander, cumin, fennel, turmeric, curry leaves, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, and more to create a perfectly balanced taste.
desc2: Beyond their exquisite flavour, these laddus support cardiac health, promote proper nervous system function, enhance immunity, and nourish your skin and hair.
desc3: Perfect for gifting, festive celebrations, or a mindful moment of self-care—every bite is a golden embrace of wellness and elegance.
